headline: Strait Of Hormuz Disruptions Recast CF Industries Supply And Valuation Story
summary: Shipping disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz have affected global fertilizer trade routes and freight availability. Ammonia and nitrogen-based fertilizer supply chains tied to Middle Eastern production remain constrained despite a partial reopening of the strait. CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF), a major producer of ammonia and nitrogen fertilizers, is directly exposed to these shifts in global supply flows. Market participants are reassessing sourcing, inventories, and pricing risks for...
